vision.text: Pepe Dome is becoming a long-term, vibrant place for contemporary circus, cultural exchange, artistic education, community programs and publicly accessible events.

meta.title: About us
meta.description: Pepe Dome is a venue for contemporary circus, cultural exchange and artistic education in Munich's Ostpark.

hero.title: About Pepe Dome
hero.subtitle: Pepe Dome is where circus arts and culture intersect — a place making performance accessible to people of every age and background.

story.title: Our story
story.text: The search for a space for contemporary circus began in 2006. Across several temporary venues (MUCCA, CircusHub, Sugar Mountain) the project grew until its official opening on 1 August 2025 in Munich's Ostpark. The geodesic dome with 8.5 m ceiling provides excellent acoustics and step-free access for spectacular shows and rigorous training.

background.title: Background & project idea
background.p1: Pepe Dome is a geodesic dome with around 200 seats. Since August 2025 it serves as a stage, training space and cultural venue in Munich's Ostpark.
background.p2: Before that, the Lunatico Theatre tent stood temporarily on the same spot. As part of the Nebourhoods project and the wind-down of Festspielhaus GmbH, the dome was handed over to us.
background.p3: We reactivated it as a venue for contemporary circus and cultural formats — with the goal of creating a permanent cultural home in the Neuperlach neighbourhood. Talks are ongoing to integrate the dome into local urban development plans.
background.p4: From 2026 the non-profit Circus Akademie München e.V. takes over operations to pursue artistic, educational and social goals.

items.title: Artistic excellence
